ModMetaData.name: RimTouch
ModMetaData.author: Tatsuki Tanaka
ModMetaData.description:
Adds an experimental direct touch input layer for RimWorld: UI tap repair, one-finger map pan, hold selection, long-press right click, double tap, two-finger pan, pinch zoom, world map touch controls, input suppression, extended zoom range, and UI scale unlock.
Primary target is Windows touch devices such as Microsoft Surface tablets and laptops. Linux touch support is experimental and depends on Unity reporting touch input through the legacy input API.
